description: Specialized vascular treatments in Mumbai. Varicose veins, diabetic foot, and more.

Advanced Vascular Care Experience world-class, minimally invasive vascular treatments. Restoring healthy blood flow, comfort, and mobility while helping you return to everyday life faster. Book Consultation WHO WE ARE Endovascular Clinic It is an advanced vascular centre in Prabhadevi, Mumbai, providing comprehensive vascular care without the need for traditional surgery. By utilizing cutting-edge endovascular techniques, our highly trained and experienced Interventional Radiologists achieve exceptional success rates. This advanced approach is recognized as the preferred, primary standard of care by leading global medical associations, including the National Institute for Health and Care Excellence (NICE, UK). Know More Endovascular Service Minimally Invasive Vascular Treatments We specialize in advanced, image-guided procedures to safely open blocked arteries, treat diseased veins, or perform targeted embolizations. These precise techniques require only tiny incisions, ensuring maximum safety, minimal discomfort, and a much faster recovery. Dr. Bhavesh Arun Popat Vascular & Interventional Radiologist View Profile Dr. Karan Anandpara Vascular & Interventional Radiologist View Profile Dr. Antariksh Vijan Vascular & Interventional Radiologist View Profile Dr. Vaibhav Thakur Vascular & Interventional Radiologist View Profile Dr. Bhavesh Arun Popat Vascular & Interventional Radiologist “ He is an eminent Vascular Specialist and Interventional Radiologist based in Mumbai, India. With over 20 years of experience, he is well regarded for his expertise in minimally invasive treatments and endovascular procedures. He has held various executive positions with the Indian Society of Vascular & Interventional Radiology (ISVIR) and is respected among the medical fraternity for his contributions to the field. ” View Profile 01 / 04 ADVANCED TECHNOLOGY High-Tech & Precision-Focused We utilize state-of-the-art imaging and high-precision equipment to diagnose and treat complex blood vessel conditions with accuracy. This cutting-edge infrastructure allows our team to navigate the vascular system safely, ensuring highly predictable outcomes and maximum patient safety. These case studies highlight the direct, life-changing impact of expert, timely vascular care. Varicose Vein & Ulcer Treatment BEFORE AFTER 5-week non-healing leg ulcer with severe swelling and varicose veins. Treated successfully with advanced compression and vein closure, resulting in complete ulcer healing and restored circulation. Venous Ulcer & Edema Treatment BEFORE AFTER Non-healing venous leg ulcer treated effectively using advanced four-layer compression dressing. The patient achieved progressive ulcer healing alongside a significant reduction in lower limb swelling and edema. EVLT Treatment for Varicose Veins BEFORE AFTER Symptomatic varicose veins involving multiple segments treated successfully using advanced Endovenous Laser Treatment. The patient achieved significantly improved venous blood flow and complete relief from symptoms. View All Results PATIENT FEEDBACK What Our Patients Say Your trust is our greatest achievement. Varicose Veins Effective Ways to Manage Varicose Veins Varicose veins can be prevented from getting worse. The calf muscles in the legs have to be kept in workable condition and the veins have to be well-toned.
